app.name: Probeta DS
app.tagline: Honest data science, end to end.

start.title: Start your experiment
start.subtitle: Upload a CSV or pick an example. Everything runs in your browser; your data never leaves it.

dropzone.label: Drag a CSV here or click to choose

marketing.name: Marketing campaign
marketing.desc: Who converts? Real signal: the model beats the baseline.

rotacion.name: Employee attrition
rotacion.desc: Who leaves? A case where a simple model is enough.

credito.name: Credit default
credito.desc: Ships with a planted leak: watch it get caught.

target.label: What do you want to predict?
target.help: It must be a column with two categories (yes/no, 0/1).

warnings.date: We found columns that look like dates ({cols}). This version doesn't split by time; they're ignored as predictors.

training.title: Training…
training.training: Training and evaluating on test data…
training.wait: The first run takes a few seconds: the engine downloads only once.

results.title: Verdict

verdict.loses: The model does NOT beat the baseline
verdict.beatsDetail: by {delta} in {metric} — {model} vs the best baseline's {baseline}
verdict.tiesDetail: a simple model does just as well: {model} vs {baseline}
verdict.losesDetail: a simple model does better: {model} vs {baseline}. Review your features.
verdict.suspiciousDetail: A perfect result almost always hides a leak, not a great model.

results.testNote: All metrics are computed on the test set, never on the training set.

leakage.title: Possible data leakage
leakage.finding: The column “{column}” could be a proxy for the target.
leakage.hint: Remove it and retrain to see the honest performance.
leakage.none: No obvious leakage found (this check is a help, not a guarantee).

errors.title: Something doesn't add up
errors.csv-empty: The file is empty or has only a header.
errors.csv-too-large: The file exceeds the 5 MB limit.
errors.csv-ragged: Some rows have a different number of columns than the header.
errors.target-not-binary: The target must have exactly two categories.
errors.no-features: There are no usable columns as predictors.
errors.runtime: Something went wrong while processing. Please try again.
